items.title: Watch: Marine Le Pen confirms run for French presidency
items.dek: The National Rally leader also said she will attempt to appeal an embezzlement conviction.
items.body: The National Rally leader also said she will attempt to appeal an embezzlement conviction.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New video shows man believed to be Tyler Robinson before Charlie Kirk shooting
items.dek: The footage shown during the second day of a preliminary hearing appears to show Robinson walking through a parking garage and running across a roof.
items.body: The footage shown during the second day of a preliminary hearing appears to show Robinson walking through a parking garage and running across a roof.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New footage shown at Kirk hearing shows man on rooftop near shooting scene
items.dek: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.
items.body: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.
items.author: IriLine Desk
